task:
FreeCAD is open with /home/user/Documents/box_to_export.FCStd, which contains a single Part::Box named 'Box' (Length 30, Width 20, Height 10).

Export the 'Box' object as an 'STL Mesh (*.stl)' file to exactly /home/user/exports/box.stl (creating /home/user/exports/ if it does not exist), then save the FCStd document.

verification.description: STL has at least 12 triangles (a closed box has >=12)
